title: habenaria fissa
intro: Habenaria fissa, also known as the split-lip orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Habenaria fissa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a remedy for snake bites. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
